evals.prompt: We are launching an AI tool that turns a founder's messy Loom demo into a polished launch video and X launch script. Build the launch angle and final X post.
evals.expected_output: Should research positioning, produce bold claim candidates, reject generic AI video-maker framing, create hooks, run weapons/mom/technical checks, and deliver a final X launch script.

evals.prompt: 帮我给一个开发者工具写 Product Hunt launch。它能把 GitHub issues 自动整理成产品 roadmap。先不要太长，但要有角度。
evals.expected_output: Should use quick or standard mode, identify developer/product-manager pain, create bold claims, avoid generic productivity copy, and provide Product Hunt-friendly launch copy.

evals.prompt: I am launching a privacy-first personal CRM for creators. I only have a short product description and no website yet. Help me figure out the viral launch positioning.
evals.expected_output: Should ask only necessary brief questions or proceed with assumptions, produce research plan, bold claim candidates, and note missing proof before final script.

evals.prompt: We need a deep launch script for a B2B AI sales copilot. Include Reddit, X, YouTube, competitor research, and a final demo narrative.
evals.expected_output: Should choose deep mode, parallelize research roles, compile findings, produce bold claim candidates, review draft with multiple reviewers, and preserve source links.
